name: tracktivity-notifications
description: Public notification and CEX listing feed for Tracktivity dApp

scripts.update:all: npm run build && node dist/update-listings.js && node dist/update-world-currencies.js && node dist/update-skr-stats.js
scripts.dev:all: ts-node src/update-listings.ts && ts-node src/update-world-currencies.ts && ts-node src/update-skr-stats.ts

author: MrJAO
